title: Ames Housing (1,001 rows)
subtitle: A real mixed-data SPN trained offline on Ames home-sale records.
about: This exported SPN is trained offline on 1,001 Ames Housing sale rows, using a compact mix of property attributes, missing lot-frontage values, and sale-price variables. The requested 1,000-row subset expands to 1,001 rows so every categorical level remains representable. The structure comes from learnSPN. The browser loads only this static JSON model; no training or backend inference happens on the website.
